description: Gather context for Phase 4 (Export Feature) by analyzing the project state and forming implementation decisions
prompt: You are preparing to plan Phase 4 (Export Feature) for this project. Read @.planning/ROADMAP.md, @.planning/REQUIREMENTS.md, @.planning/STATE.md, and @src/utils.js. FEAT-03 requires an export command that outputs widgets as CSV or JSON. Propose: what implementation decisions need to be made? What are the key questions? Output a CONTEXT.md-style document with sections: Phase Boundary, Decisions (with specific choices), and Deferred Ideas.
